title: choretrum pauciflorum
intro: Choretrum pauciflorum, also known as the few-flowered choretrum, is a shrub native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Choretrum pauciflorum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being.
